topicOverview: An in-depth deep dive into REST APIs. Mastering this is critical for passing technical interviews for Mobile App Developer roles.
whyItMatters: REST APIs is a core foundation of modern engineering. Interviewers use it as a proxy to test your deeper understanding of systems, performance, and best practices.
examples: Implementing REST APIs in a real-world scenario
Handling edge cases in REST APIs
practiceQuestions: Write a program demonstrating REST APIs.

interviewQuestions: What are the pros and cons of REST APIs?
How does REST APIs handle memory management?
advancedProjects: Integrate REST APIs into a microservice
Scale REST APIs for 10k concurrent users
companyQuestions: How Amazon asks about REST APIs
